subject: English
title: Extended Reading Passages with Questions – Madam Rides the Bus
instructions: Read each passage carefully. Answer the questions using information only from the given paragraph.

Passages.paragraph: Madam, a young girl, is curious about the city. She decides to take a bus ride alone, despite her mother’s warnings.
questions: Who is Madam and what does she want?
Why does she take the bus alone?
What does her curiosity tell you about her character?
Which words show independence?
How does this paragraph set the story’s plot?

Passages.paragraph: During the ride, Madam observes people and their behaviors. She notices the differences between village life and city life and feels excited by the new experiences.
questions: What does Madam observe during the bus ride?
How does city life differ from village life?
Which words show her excitement?
What new experiences does she encounter?
Why is this paragraph important to the story?

Passages.paragraph: Madam talks to a kind woman on the bus who explains some aspects of city life. She listens attentively and learns new things, feeling proud of her courage.
questions: Who does Madam talk to on the bus?
What does she learn from the woman?
Which words show her attentiveness?
How does she feel about herself?
Why is this interaction significant in the story?

Passages.paragraph: As the bus journey continues, Madam enjoys the sights and sounds of the city. She experiences a sense of freedom and independence she had never felt before.
questions: What does Madam enjoy during the journey?
Which words show her sense of freedom?
How does the city affect her feelings?
Why is this moment important for her character?
What is the main idea of this paragraph?

Passages.paragraph: By the end of the ride, Madam returns home with stories to tell and lessons learned. Her adventure teaches her self-confidence and the joy of exploring new places.
questions: What happens at the end of Madam’s journey?
What does she learn from the adventure?
Which words show self-confidence?
How does this ride change her perspective?
What is the main idea of this paragraph?
